_comment: GPU lane registry + zone schedule for the Evergreen lane manager. M90t is the pinned-service host; Framerstation and vidbox are on-demand workers. VRAM totals for non-local hosts are nominal (we can only read Ollama's loaded-model VRAM remotely, not the card total). Edit roles/zones here.

lanes.name: M90t / lynnthink
lanes.note: Control plane + pinned always-on services (VoxStation, TTS, Whisper, Atelier).

lanes.name: Framerstation
lanes.note: Specialist model worker. OpenCode (qwen3.5:27b) + Atelier agents load here on-demand.

lanes.name: vidbox
lanes.note: Image/video/Resolve/ComfyUI. llama.cpp (qwen3-coder-next) for heavy batch coding.

zones.note: Keep interactive lanes responsive; defer heavy/batch work.

defaultZone.note: Outside any defined zone: everything allowed, on-demand.
